headline: How Lyft’s Expanded DashPass and MileagePlus Tie-Ups At Lyft (LYFT) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late April 2026, DoorDash and Lyft expanded their DashPass partnership into Canada, while Lyft and United Airlines added a new “pay with miles” feature in the U.S., allowing MileagePlus members to redeem miles directly for eligible Lyft rides. Together, these collaborations deepen Lyft’s integration into everyday spending and travel loyalty programs, broadening its access to high-frequency riders across North America. We’ll now examine how Lyft’s tighter integration with DoorDash’s...

headline: Lyft Ties DashPass And United Miles To Deepen Rider Loyalty Loops
summary: Lyft (NasdaqGS:LYFT) is extending its existing DoorDash DashPass benefits to riders in Canada, broadening access to bundled mobility and delivery perks. The company is launching a new feature with United Airlines that lets United MileagePlus members redeem airline miles directly to pay for Lyft rides. Lyft operates in the ride hailing and transportation services space, where platforms are increasingly tying core mobility offerings to memberships and loyalty programs. The expanded DashPass...

headline: DoorDash Expands DashPass Ecosystem As Valuation And Growth Debate Deepens
summary: DoorDash (NasdaqGS:DASH) is expanding its DashPass partnership with Lyft to Canada, adding international rideshare benefits for members. The company is launching new partnerships with retailers and grocery chains, including Empire Company Limited and Rally House. These moves extend DoorDash beyond restaurant delivery into grocery, retail, and lifestyle services within its membership offering. For investors watching DoorDash, the latest announcements point to a business that now spans food...
